{{Infobox character
| name = Lion Monarch
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|If [[Yerin]] loses, [[Penance]] goes to the Dragon or Lion [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] has enmity with the [[Lion Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Lion Monarch]] openly assaulted the Valley.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
